name: translator
title: Translator
description: Translate text between any source and target language using Groq llama-3.3-70b-versatile with structured function output.

endpoints.title: Translate Text With Query Params
endpoints.description: Translate text using query fields: text, from, and to. Use from=auto to detect the source language.

endpoints.title: Translate Text With JSON Body
endpoints.description: Translate text using JSON body fields: text, from, and to. Use from=auto to detect the source language.
